targets.expr: sum by (component, pool) (wukongim_runtime_pool_inflight{node_name=~"$node_name"}) / clamp_min(sum by (component, pool) (wukongim_runtime_pool_workers{node_name=~"$node_name"}), 1)

sum by (component, pool, queue, priority) (wukongim_runtime_pool_queue_depth{node_name=~"$node_name"}) / clamp_min(sum by (component, pool, queue, priority) (wukongim_runtime_pool_queue_capacity{node_name=~"$node_name"}), 1)

sum by (component, pool, queue, priority) (wukongim_runtime_pool_queue_bytes{node_name=~"$node_name"}) / clamp_min(sum by (component, pool, queue, priority) (wukongim_runtime_pool_queue_bytes_capacity{node_name=~"$node_name"}), 1)
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, component, pool, queue) (rate(wukongim_runtime_pool_wait_duration_seconds_bucket{node_name=~"$node_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, component, pool, task) (rate(wukongim_runtime_pool_task_duration_seconds_bucket{node_name=~"$node_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
